text.title: AI Interview Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-interview-analysis. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Author asks LLM to summarise audio descriptions; output is hallucinatory.
Single quote becomes a published theme; PRD over-rotates.
Agent miscoded 30 % of themes; stakeholders find errors post-publish.
PRD treats Low-confidence themes as equal evidence to High-confidence.
antipattern.fix: Label per theme; PRDs filter by confidence.
